Object.Name: AppAccounting
Object.Description1: This LwM2M Object provides facilities for service flow level accounting and throttling per application.

Item.Name: Collection Period
Item.Description: A string in RFC 5545 Recurrence Rule (RRule) format defining the collection period (e.g., "RRULE:FREQ=MINUTELY;INTERVAL=60"). Collection period counters shall be automatically reset at the end of each collection period.

Item.Name: Maximum Bytes
Item.Description: Hard limit maximum number of bytes allowed per collection period, above which the device initiates throttling of the app referenced in resource 4050 without direction from the Server.

Item.Name: TX Bytes
Item.Description: Number of bytes transmitted so far during the collection period for the app referenced in resource 4050.

Item.Name: RX Bytes
Item.Description: Number of bytes received so far during the collection period for the app referenced in resource 4050.

Item.Name: Total Bytes
Item.Description: Number of bytes transmitted and received so far during the collection period for the app referenced in resource 4050.

Item.Name: TX Packets
Item.Description: Number of packets transmitted so far during the collection period for the app referenced in resource 4050.

Item.Name: RX Packets
Item.Description: Number of packets received so far during the collection period for the app referenced in resource 4050.

Item.Name: Start Throttling
Item.Description: Start throttling traffic for the app referenced in resource 4050.

Item.Name: Stop Throttling
Item.Description: Stop throttling traffic for the app referenced in resource 4050.

Item.Name: Software Instance
Item.Description: Optional object link to the LwM2M Software Management Object instance representing the installed application package associated with this accounting instance. Resource 4050 AppID remains the primary GEISA application identity for this object.

Item.Name: Accounting Class
Item.Description: Communication class accounted by this instance for the application identified by resource 4050 AppID. 0 = Unspecified 1 = App-message traffic 2 = Direct IP traffic 3 = Local traffic 4 = Upstream WAN traffic 5..127 = Reserved for future GEISA-defined accounting classes 128..255 = Reserved for vendor-specific or operator-specific accounting classes This resource defines what communication class is counted, limited, throttled, or blocked by this accounting instance.

Item.Name: Accounting Scope
Item.Description: Boundary or scope for accounting associated with resource 4050 AppID. 0 = Unspecified 1 = Application 2 = Application instance 3 = Interface or bearer 4 = Network class 5 = Platform policy class 6..127 = Reserved for future GEISA-defined accounting scopes 128..255 = Reserved for vendor-specific or operator-specific accounting scopes This resource defines the scope boundary for the counters, limits, throttling, and block state of this accounting instance.

Item.Name: Scope Label
Item.Description: Optional platform-provided label describing the accounting scope when Accounting Scope is more specific than the application identified by resource 4050 AppID. Examples include an interface name, bearer label, network class, or operator policy bucket identifier.

Item.Name: Volume State
Item.Description: Current quota or policy state for the communication accounted by this instance. 0 = Unknown 1 = Normal or available 2 = Unlimited 3 = Exhausted 4 = Throttled 5 = Blocked or policy restricted 6..127 = Reserved for future GEISA-defined volume states 128..255 = Reserved for vendor-specific or operator-specific volume states

Item.Name: Bytes Remaining
Item.Description: Bytes remaining in the active collection or quota period for the communication covered by this accounting instance. A value of zero indicates that the configured byte allowance has been exhausted or no bytes remain under the current policy.

Item.Name: Message Limit
Item.Description: Configured message count limit for the active collection or quota period. This limit applies to app or platform communication messages counted by the accounting policy for the application identified by resource 4050 AppID, and not to all LwM2M protocol exchanges unless platform policy explicitly documents that behavior.

Item.Name: Messages Remaining
Item.Description: Messages remaining in the active collection or quota period. This resource applies to app or platform communication messages counted by the accounting policy for this accounting instance.

Item.Name: TX Messages
Item.Description: Number of app or platform communication messages transmitted so far during the collection period for the communication covered by this accounting instance. This resource does not count all LwM2M protocol exchanges unless the accounting policy explicitly says so.

Item.Name: RX Messages
Item.Description: Number of app or platform communication messages received so far during the collection period for the communication covered by this accounting instance. This resource does not count all LwM2M protocol exchanges unless the accounting policy explicitly says so.

Item.Name: Total Messages
Item.Description: Total app or platform communication messages transmitted plus received so far during the collection period for the communication covered by this accounting instance.

Item.Name: Throttle State
Item.Description: Current throttling or block state for the communication covered by this accounting instance. 0 = Unknown 1 = Not throttled 2 = Throttled 3 = Blocked 4..127 = Reserved for future GEISA-defined throttle states 128..255 = Reserved for vendor-specific or operator-specific throttle states

Item.Name: Throttle Reason
Item.Description: Reason for the current or most recent throttling or block state. 0 = None 1 = Unknown 2 = Byte quota exceeded 3 = Message quota exceeded 4 = Operator policy 5 = QoS policy 6 = Network unavailable 7 = Platform resource protection 8 = Security or policy violation 9 = Application disabled or stopped 10..127 = Reserved for future GEISA-defined throttle reasons 128..255 = Reserved for vendor-specific or operator-specific throttle reasons

Item.Name: Throttle Rate Limit
Item.Description: Configured byte-per-second rate limit applied while this accounting instance is throttled. A value of zero indicates that communication covered by this accounting instance or scope is blocked rather than rate-limited.

Item.Name: Period Start Time
Item.Description: Start time for the active collection period represented by the counters in this accounting instance.

Item.Name: Next Reset Time
Item.Description: Time at which current-period counters and remaining quota values are expected to reset for this accounting instance.

Item.Name: Last Update Timestamp
Item.Description: Time at which the platform last updated this accounting object instance.

Item.Name: Last Throttle Timestamp
Item.Description: Time of the most recent throttling state transition for the communication covered by this accounting instance.

Item.Name: Last Quota Exhausted Timestamp
Item.Description: Time at which the platform most recently detected exhaustion of the configured byte or message quota for this accounting instance.

Item.Name: Last Policy Violation Timestamp
Item.Description: Time of the most recent detected communication policy violation associated with this accounting instance.

Item.Name: Violation Count Current Period
Item.Description: Number of communication policy violations detected during the active collection period for this accounting instance.

Item.Name: Reset Accounting Period
Item.Description: Reset current-period counters for the communication covered by this accounting instance and start a new collection period. Platforms MAY deny this operation according to operator policy.

Item.Name: Block Communication
Item.Description: Block communication covered by this accounting instance and scope. This operation applies only to the communication represented by this accounting instance unless the accounting scope explicitly covers a broader boundary.

Item.Name: Unblock Communication
Item.Description: Remove an explicit communication block for the communication covered by this accounting instance and scope. This operation applies only to the communication represented by this accounting instance unless the accounting scope explicitly covers a broader boundary.

Item.Name: AppID
Item.Description: A unique local-scope identifier for distinguishing edge applications within a specific deployment environment.
